studyName: The Role of E2F4 in Controlling Resistance to Irinotecan (CPT-11) in Human Colon Cancer

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of analyte

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site from which the specimen used to generate the cell line was collected

variables.name: CLONE_ID
variables.description: Name of isogenic clone of engineered cell line

variables.name: COLLECTION_AGE
variables.description: Subject's age at the time of collection of the specimen used to generate the cell line

variables.name: DRUG_TREATMENT_IN_VITRO
variables.description: Treatment (drug, concentration) administered to engineered cells before analysis by RNA-seq

variables.name: EXPERIMENTAL_REPLICATE
variables.description: Number of experimental replicate

variables.name: GENETIC_MODIFICATION
variables.description: Genetic modification introduced in the cell line

variables.name: GRNA_CONSTRUCT
variables.description: Name of gRNA construct used to genetically engineer the cell line

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type of the sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary vs. metastatic origin of specimen used to generate the cell line

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID of individual samples analyzed by RNA-seq

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sampled material (cell line vs. tissue)

variables.name: TREATMENT_DURATION_IN_VITRO
variables.description: Duration of treatment (hours) administered to engineered cells before analysis by RNA-seq

variables.name: TUMOR_GRADE
variables.description: Tumor grade of the specimen used to generate the cell line

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by data-access committee (DAC)

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID  (catalog number) used in the source repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID of cell line used to generate the samples analyzed by RNA-seq

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository from which the cell line was obtained

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID of individual samples analyzed by RNA-seq

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID of cell line used to generate the samples analyzed by RNA-seq
